q1.question: Cómo do I instalar and activar an eSIM on an iPhone?
q1.answer: Go to Configuración → Cellular → Agregar eSIM → Scan the QR code from your order confirmation. Follow the prompts and your eSIM will be ready in minutos.

q2.question: Cómo do I instalar and activar an eSIM on an Android dispositivo?
q2.answer: Go to Configuración → Red & Internet → SIMs → Agregar eSIM → Scan QR code. The exact path may vary by manufacturer (Samsung, Google Pixel, etc.).

q3.question: Cómo do I instalar manually without código QR?
q3.answer: Go to Configuración → Cellular/Mobile → Agregar eSIM → Enter Details Manually. Input the SM-DP+ address and activation code from your order confirmation email.

q4.question: How do I set up eSIM using the Direct Instalación Link?
q4.answer: Simply click the direct instalación link sent to su correo. Su teléfono will automáticamente recognize it and prompt usted to instalar the eSIM perfil.

q5.question: My código QR isn't working. Qué should I do?
q5.answer: Ensure usted have a stable WiFi conexión, try scanning in good lighting, or use the manual instalación method. If issues persist, contacto soporte.

q6.question: Dónde can I find my código QR or manual detalles?
q6.answer: Su código QR and manual instalación detalles are sent to su correo inmediatamente after compra. Check su inbox and spam folder.

q7.question: Cómo can I verify that my eSIM is conectado?
q7.answer: Go to Configuración → Cellular/Mobile Datos. You should see your eSIM profile listed and enabled. Look for signal bars or 'LTE/5G' indicator.

q1.question: ¿Puedo usar Hotspot/Tethering?
q1.answer: Sí! Hotspot/tethering is supported on all our plans. You can share your data connection with other devices.

q2.question: ¿Cuándo comienza mi plan de datos?
q2.answer: Su plan starts cuándo usted first connect to mobile datos at su destino, not cuándo usted scan the código QR. Usted can instalar it in advance.

q3.question: ¿Cómo funcionan sus planes de datos?
q3.answer: Todos Mobile11 eSIM plans keep you connected. Choose from three plan types: Ilimitado for truly unlimited data at maximum speeds with no throttling, Lite for high speeds upfront then 384 Kbps backup after your quota, or Standard for daily high-speed allowance that resets every 24 horas with backup speeds after.

q4.question: Mi velocidad de internet disminuyó repentinamente. ¿Qué debo hacer?
q4.answer: Es posible que haya alcanzado su límite diario de alta velocidad. Su velocidad se restablecerá después de 24 horas desde el primer uso.

q5.question: ¿Cuándo se restablecerán mis datos de alta velocidad?
q5.answer: For Standard plans, your high-speed quota resets every 24 horas from your first use. For example, if you activate at 3PM, your high-speed data resets at 3PM the next día.

q6.question: ¿Puedo verificar el uso de datos?
q6.answer: Sí! Check your data usage in your device settings (Configuración → Cellular/Mobile Datos) or log into your mobile11 account dashboard.

q1.question: ¿Qué dispositivos son compatibles con eSIM?
q1.answer: Mobile11 eSIMs are compatible with a wide range of newer smartphones and tablets including iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20 and newer, Google Pixel 2 and newer, and models from Huawei, Oppo, Motorola, Sony, Xiaomi, Sharp, Honor, Vivo, OnePlus, Nokia, Asus, Realme, Nothing, and more. Note: Devices manufactured in China/Hong Kong do not have eSIM functionality. Check Configuración → Cellular → Agregar eSIM to verify your device supports eSIM.

q2.question: ¿Mi teléfono está desbloqueado para usar eSIM?
q2.answer: Su teléfono debe estar desbloqueado (no vinculado a un operador) para usar nuestra eSIM.

q3.question: ¿La eSIM incluye un número de teléfono?
q3.answer: No, nuestro eSIMs are datos-only plans. Keep su primary SIM for calls/SMS, or use apps like WhatsApp, LINE, or Telegram for communication.

q1.question: Cómo do I fix 'No Internet Conexión' after activating the eSIM?
q1.answer: Ensure Datos Roaming is ON (Configuración → Mobile Datos → Datos Roaming). Restart your device and set the eSIM as your primary data line.

q2.question: Mi eSIM muestra 4G/5G pero no hay internet. ¿Qué debo hacer?
q2.answer: Try: 1) Restart phone, 2) Toggle Airplane Mode on/off, 3) Switch from 5G to LTE, 4) Ensure Datos Roaming is ON. Contacto support if issue persists.

q3.question: ¿Cómo cambiar la selección de red?
q3.answer: Go to Configuración → Mobile Red → Red Operators → Seleccionar manually. Try different available networks if you experience connectivity issues.

q1.question: ¿Puedo reinstalar/reutilizar mi eSIM?
q1.answer: Sí! If you accidentally delete your eSIM, you can reinstall it using the same QR code as long as your plan is still valid.

q2.question: Can I use the eSIM on multiple dispositivos?
q2.answer: No, each eSIM can only be activo on one dispositivo at a time. Usted'll need to compra a separate eSIM for each dispositivo.

q3.question: Can I eliminar my eSIM?
q3.answer: Sí, go to Configuración → Cellular → Seleccionar your eSIM profile → Eliminar eSIM. Guardar your QR code before deleting in case you need to reinstall.

q4.question: Qué happens if my eSIM expires?
q4.answer: Once expirado, su eSIM will no longer provide datos service. Compra a new plan before su trip ends, or keep unused datos plans for future travels.

q1.question: Cuándo will I receive my eSIM?
q1.answer: Instantly! Your QR code and installation details are delivered via email within minutos of purchase. No waiting required.

q2.question: Qué is the reembolso policy?
q2.answer: We offer full refunds for unused eSIMs within 14 días of purchase. Once activated, refunds are subject to our terms and conditions.

q3.question: Cómo can I contacto customer soporte?
q3.answer: Correo electrónico us at support@mobile11.com, use our live chat, or submit a support ticket. We're available 24/7 to help!

q1.question: Cómo do I join the afiliado program?
q1.answer: Visit our Partner Program page and click 'Join Now'. Fill out the registration form with your details, and our team will review your application within 24-48 horas.

q2.question: Qué comisión rates do affiliates ganar?
q2.answer: Affiliates ganar 10% comisión on every sale. Socio Managers ganar 15% on direct sales plus 5% override comisión on their team's sales. There's no cap on earnings!

q3.question: Cómo and cuándo do I get paid?
q3.answer: We offer monthly payouts via bank transfer or PayPal. The minimum payout threshold is $50 USD. Pagos are processed on the 15th of each month for the previous month's earnings.

q4.question: Cómo long is the cookie/attribution window?
q4.answer: We use a 30-día cookie window. If someone clicks your affiliate link and makes a purchase within 30 días, you'll receive the commission for that sale.

q5.question: Dónde can I track my afiliado performance?
q5.answer: Iniciar sesiónto your Affiliate Panel de Control to see real-time statistics including clicks, conversions, commission earnings, and pending payouts.

q6.question: ¿Puedo promocionar Mobile11 en redes sociales?
q6.answer: Absolutely! Usted can share su afiliado link on any platform - websites, blogs, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook, and more. Nosotros also provide marketing materials to ayuda usted succeed.

q1.question: Cómo do I log in with LINE?
q1.answer: Click 'Sign In' and seleccionar the LINE button. Usted'll be redirected to LINE to authorize access. Once approved, usted'll be automáticamente logged in. Su LINE perfil picture and name will be linked to su Mobile11 cuenta.

q2.question: Cómo will I receive my eSIM after compra?
q2.answer: If usted logged in with LINE: Su pedido confirmation with código QR, ICCID, and instalación instructions will be sent directly to su LINE chat. If usted logged in with correo: Su confirmation will be sent to su registered correo address. Both methods include everything usted need to instalar su eSIM al instante.

q3.question: I logged in with LINE - can I also get an correo copy of my pedido?
q3.answer: Sí! During checkout, LINE users will see an optional 'Want an email copy too?' field. Simply enter your email address and you'll receive both a LINE chat notification AND an email confirmation with your eSIM details.

q4.question: Can I link my LINE cuenta to an existing Mobile11 cuenta?
q4.answer: Currently, LINE login creates a new cuenta linked to su LINE perfil. If usted already have a Mobile11 cuenta with an correo, usted can continue using correo login to access su existing pedidos and perfil.

activation.description: Su eSIM will activar automáticamente cuándo usted arrive at su destino. Here are some important tips:
activation.tip1: Turn on Datos Roaming for your eSIM line
activation.tip2: Seleccionar the eSIM as your primary data line

issue1.title: Código QR Won't Scan
issue1.solution: Ensure good lighting and hold su dispositivo steady. Usted can also enter the activación code manually if needed.

issue2.title: No Red Signal

issue3.title: Can't Instalar eSIM
issue3.solution: Verify your device is eSIM compatible and carrier unlocked. Eliminar any existing unused eSIM profiles if you've reached your device limit.

q1.question: Cómo do I check if my dispositivo supports eSIM?
q1.answer: Go to Configuración → Cellular/Mobile Datos → look for 'Agregar eSIM' or 'Agregar Cellular Plan' option. If you see this option, your device supports eSIM. Alternatively, dial *#06# to see if an EID (eSIM ID) is displayed.

q2.question: Can I use eSIM if my teléfono is operador-locked?
q2.answer: No, your device must be carrier-unlocked to use eSIM from Mobile11. Contacto your carrier to check if your device is locked and request an unlock if needed.

q3.question: Por qué doesn't my China/Hong Kong purchased dispositivo soporte eSIM?
q3.answer: Dispositivos manufactured for or sold in mainland China and Hong Kong typically have eSIM functionality disabled due to local regulations. This applies even to models that soporte eSIM in other regions.

q4.question: ¿Puedo usar eSIM en mi tableta o reloj inteligente?
q4.answer: Sí, many iPads, Samsung Galaxy Tabs, and smartwatches support eSIM. Check your device's specifications or settings to confirm eSIM compatibility.

q1.question: Qué is an eSIM?
q1.answer: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that's built into su dispositivo. Unlike physical tarjetas SIM that usted insert into su teléfono, an eSIM is activated digitally by scanning a código QR or entering activación detalles. It performs the same function as a traditional tarjeta SIM but without the physical card.

q2.question: Which mobile dispositivos are compatible with eSIM?
q2.answer: Mobile11 eSIMs are compatible with a wide range of newer smartphones and tablets including iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20 and newer, Google Pixel 2 and newer, and models from Huawei, Oppo, Motorola, Sony, Xiaomi, Sharp, Honor, Vivo, OnePlus, Nokia, Asus, Realme, Nothing, and more. Note: Devices manufactured in China/Hong Kong do not have eSIM functionality. Check Configuración → Cellular → Agregar eSIM to verify your device supports eSIM.

q3.question: Cuándo does my datos plan begin?
q3.answer: Su plan starts cuándo usted first connect to mobile datos at su destino, not cuándo usted scan the código QR. Usted can instalar it in advance.

q4.question: Cómo do su datos plans work?
q4.answer: Todos Mobile11 eSIM plans keep you connected. Choose from three plan types: Ilimitado for truly unlimited data at maximum speeds with no throttling, Lite for high speeds upfront then 384 Kbps backup after your quota, or Standard for daily high-speed allowance that resets every 24 horas with backup speeds after.

q5.question: Cuándo will I receive my eSIM?
q5.answer: Instantly! Your QR code and installation details are delivered via email within minutos of purchase. No waiting required.

q1.question: Can I use eSIM as my main data source in Tailandia?
q1.answer: Absolutely! Many Thai locals use eSIM as their primary datos conexión. Usted can keep su existing SIM for voice calls and use eSIM for datos.

q2.question: What's the difference between Day Pass, Max Velocidad, and Limitless?
q2.answer: Day Pass gives you daily high-speed data with 1Mbps backup. Max Velocidad provides high speeds upfront then 384 Kbps to keep you connected. Limitless offers unlimited data at maximum speeds with no throttling, plus it works in 13 Asian countries.

q3.question: Does eSIM work with my Thai teléfono number?
q3.answer: Sí! eSIM works alongside your existing Thai number. Most modern phones support dual SIM, so you can keep your main number for calls and SMS while using eSIM for data.

q4.question: Cómo fast is the red?
q4.answer: We provide 3G/4G/5G coverage across Tailandia. Limitless plans offer maximum speeds with no throttling. Day Pass and Max Velocidad plans have specific speed tiers but keep you connected at all times.

q5.question: ¿Puedo cambiar entre planes?
q5.answer: Sí! You can easily add new eSIM plans to your device and switch between them. This flexibility is one of the key advantages of eSIM technology.

q1.question: Cómo much can I ganar as an afiliado?
q1.answer: Comisión rates are tiered based on su mensual sales volume. Start at 8% and ganar up to 16% as usted grow! Starter (0-10 sales): 8%, Bronze (11-30): 10%, Silver (31-60): 12%, Gold (61-100): 14%, Platinum (101+): 16%. Plus loyalty bonuses of up to +3% for long-term partners. Socio Managers also ganar override commissions (2-5%) on their team's sales. There's no cap on earnings!

q2.question: Cómo do I get paid?
q2.answer: Nosotros offer mensual payouts via bank transfer or PayPal. The minimum payout threshold is $50 USD. Usted can track su earnings in real-time through su dashboard.

q3.question: Cómo long does approval take?
q3.answer: Most applications are reviewed within 24-48 horas. Once approved, you'll receive access to your dashboard and can start sharing your affiliate link immediately.

q4.question: Qué is the cookie duración?
q4.answer: We use a 30-día cookie window. This means if someone clicks your link and makes a purchase within 30 días, you'll receive the commission.

q5.question: ¿Puedo promocionar Mobile11 en redes sociales?
q5.answer: Absolutely! Usted can share su afiliado link on any platform - websites, blogs, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook, and more.

q6.question: ¿Necesito un sitio web para unirme?
q6.answer: No website required! Usted can share su link via social media, messaging apps, or any other channel. However, having a website or content platform can ayuda increase su reach.

q7.question: Qué marketing materials do usted provide?
q7.answer: Nosotros provide banners, logos, product images, and suggested copy. Socio Managers also receive additional promotional content and priority access to new materials.

q8.question: Cómo do I become a Socio Manager?
q8.answer: Todos affiliates can recruit sub-affiliates and earn override commissions (2-5% based on your tier) on their team's sales. As you reach higher tiers through monthly sales, your direct and override rates increase. Focus on both direct sales and building your network to maximize earnings.

privacyPolicy.title: Su Privacy Matters

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.p1: Welcome to Mobile11. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Política de Privacidad explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our eSIM services, website, and mobile applications (collectively, the "Services").
section1.p2: By using our Services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Política de Privacidad. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services.

section2.title: 2. Definitions
section2.accountDesc: A unique cuenta created for usted to access nuestro Services.
section2.customerDesc: The individual accessing or using nuestro Services.
section2.deviceDesc: Any dispositivo that can access nuestro Services such as a smartphone, tablet, or computer.
section2.esimDesc: An embedded tarjeta SIM that allows usted to activar a mobile datos plan without using a physical tarjeta SIM.
section2.personalDataDesc: Informaciónrmation that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
section2.servicesDesc: Nuestro eSIM services, website, mobile applications, and related services provided by Mobile11.

section3.title: 3. Informaciónrmation We Collect
section3.personalInfoDesc: Cuándo usted register for an cuenta or use nuestro Services, nosotros may collect:
personalInfoItems: Pago information (processed securely through third-party payment processors)

section4.title: 4. How We Use Your Informaciónrmation
section4.intro: Nosotros use the information nosotros collect for the following purposes:
section4.serviceProvisionDesc: To provide, maintain, and improve nuestro eSIM services, process su pedidos, and activar su eSIM paquetes.
section4.customerSupportDesc: To respond to su inquiries, provide technical soporte, and resolve issues.
section4.paymentProcessingDesc: To process transactions and send usted related information including compra confirmations and invoices.
section4.personalizationDesc: To personalize su experience and recommend relevant eSIM paquetes based on su travel destinos.
section4.communicationDesc: To send usted service updates, promotional offers, and important notices about nuestro Services.
section4.securityDesc: To detect, prevent, and address technical issues, fraudulent activities, and security threats.
section4.legalComplianceDesc: Para cumplir con obligaciones legales y responder a solicitudes legítimas de autoridades públicas.
section4.analyticsDesc: To analyze usage patterns and improve nuestro Services, website, and user experience.

section5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Procesando
section5.intro: Nosotros process su personal datos based on the following legal grounds:
section5.consentDesc: Usted have given clear consent for us to process su personal datos for specific purposes.
section5.contractPerformanceDesc: Procesando is necessary to fulfill our contract with you and provide the Services you requested.
section5.legalObligationsDesc: Procesando is necessary to comply with legal obligations such as tax and accounting requirements.
section5.legitimateInterestsDesc: Procesando is necessary for our legitimate business interests, such as fraud prevention and improving our Services, provided these interests do not override your rights.

section6.title: 6. Informaciónrmation Sharing and Disclosure
section6.intro: Nosotros may share su information in the following circumstances:
section6.serviceProvidersDesc: Nosotros work with third-party service providers who perform services on nuestro behalf, including:
serviceProvidersItems: eSIM provisioning partners (USIMSA and network carriers)
section6.businessPartnersDesc: Nosotros share necessary information with mobile red operators to activar and provide eSIM services in different países.
section6.legalRequirementsDesc: Nosotros may disclose su information if required by law or in response to:
legalRequirementsItems: Legal processes, court orders, or government requests
Protection of rights, property, or safety of Mobile11, our users, or the public
Prevention of fraud or security threats
section6.businessTransfersDesc: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, su information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.
section6.noSelling: Important: Nosotros never sell su personal datos to third parties for marketing purposes.

section7.title: 7. Datos Retention
section7.intro: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Política de Privacidad, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

refundPolicy.title: Política de Reembolsos
refundPolicy.intro: At Mobile11, we want you to be completely satisfied with your eSIM purchase. This Política de Reembolsos explains when and how you may be eligible for a refund.

section1.title: 1. General Reembolso Eligibility
section1.p1: Due to the digital nature of eSIM products, reembolso eligibility depends on the activación estado of su eSIM:

subsection1.title: eSIMs No Activadas
items: Full refund available within 30 días of purchase
eSIM QR code must not have been scanned or installed
Refund processed to original payment method

subsection2.title: eSIMs Activadas
subsection2.content: Generalmente no reembolsable una vez activada, con excepciones por problemas técnicos (ver Sección 3)

section2.title: 2. Situaciones No Reembolsables
section2.intro: Refunds are NOT disponible in the following situations:
items: eSIM has been successfully activated and used
Change of travel plans or no longer needing the service
Purchasing the wrong package (wrong country/data amount)
Device incompatibility that was not verified before purchase
Service worked as described but did not meet personal expectations
Validez period has expired

section3.title: 3. Reembolsos por Problemas Técnicos
section3.intro: Nosotros will provide a full reembolso or replacement if:
items: The eSIM fails to activate due to a technical error on our side
The QR code is defective or cannot be read
The eSIM does not provide the advertised service in the covered country
Red connectivity is completely unavailable (not just slow speeds)
section3.p2: To qualify for a technical issue refund, you must provide evidence of the issue and contact our support team within 7 días of attempting activation.

section4.title: 4. Compras Promocionales
section4.content: Purchases made with promotional codes or during special sales events are subject to the same reembolso policy. The reembolso monto will be the actual monto paid after any discounts were applied.

section5.title: 5. Cómo to Request a Reembolso
section5.step1: Contacto our support team via email at support@mobile11.com
section5.step2: Provide su pedido number and correo address
section5.step3: Explain the reason for su reembolso request
section5.step4: Incluya capturas de pantalla o documentación relevante
section5.p2: Our team will review your request within 2-3 business días and respond with a decision.

subsection1.title: Procesando Time
items: Refund decisions are made within 2-3 business días
Approved refunds are processed within 5-7 business días
Bank processing may take an additional 5-10 business días

subsection2.title: Reembolso Method
subsection2.content: Refunds are issued to the original pago method used for the compra. Nosotros cannot process refunds to different pago methods or accounts.

section7.title: 7. Reembolsos Parciales
section7.intro: Se pueden ofrecer reembolsos parciales en ciertas circunstancias:
items: Service was partially used before a technical issue occurred
Package was only partially functional in the covered region
Other situations at our discretion

section8.title: 8. Contracargos

section8.p2: Fraudulent chargebacks may result in cuenta suspension and legal action.

q1.question: Cuándo does my datos plan begin?
q1.answer: The data plan begins as soon as you connect to the local network at your destination. Its validity lasts for the number of días included in your plan, starting from the moment of activation. You can review the details in the destination description before making a purchase.

q2.question: My código QR isn't working. Qué should I do?
q2.intro: There are a few reasons por qué usted might be having trouble scanning su código QR. Please go through the checklist below:

step1.title: Is su teléfono compatible with eSIM?
step1.desc: Make sure su teléfono supports eSIM. If it does but still won't register, check that su dispositivo is unlocked.

step2.title: Are usted conectado to Wi-Fi?
step2.desc: eSIM activación requires an internet conexión. For the best experience, activar su eSIM at home on Wi-Fi before su trip.

step3.title: Try manual activación.
step3.desc: If the código QR doesn't work, usted can activar manually. Mobile11 provides a manual activación code in the correo with su código QR.

step4.title: ¿La eSIM ya fue activada?
step4.desc: Each código QR can only be scanned once. If usted see a message like 'Cannot add datos plan', it may already be activated. Check su teléfono's tarjeta SIM manager or cellular configuración.

step5.title: ¿Aún no funciona?
step5.desc: If none of the above helps, reach out to nuestro 24/7 customer soporte via chat. Nosotros'll ayuda usted get conectado.

q3.question: Qué is an eSIM?
q3.answer: eSIM is a digital SIM card that enables you to connect to mobile networks without needing a physical card. You can keep multiple eSIMs, allowing access to various carriers, phone numbers, and data plans—perfect for travel or daily use. Just activate it on your device, and you'll be online in minutos.

q4.question: ¿Puedo usar Hotspot/Tethering?
q4.answer: There may be some restrictions depending on the local service provider, but in general, Mobile11 eSIMs soporte datos sharing with other dispositivos. Usted can check the destino's description in advance before purchasing.

q5.question: Is the eSIM activated inmediatamente upon scanning the código QR?
q5.answer: No! Mobile11 eSIM activates once you connect to the local network at your destination. You can set it up 2–3 horas before your departure, then simply turn on data roaming when you arrive to get connected instantly.

q6.question: Cuándo should I set up my eSIM?
q6.answer: We recommend activating your eSIM 2–3 horas before your trip. Please note that you must be connected to Wi-Fi or mobile data during the setup process, as an internet connection is required to install and activate it.

q7.question: Does Mobile11 eSIM come with a teléfono number for calls or messaging?
q7.answer: No, Mobile11 eSIM is designed for high-velocidad internet only. The good news is usted can keep su own teléfono number and all su contacts, so usted can stay conectado through WhatsApp, iMessage, LINE, WeChat, or su favorite apps while enjoying reliable datos abroad.

q8.question: Can I check the datos usage?
q8.answer: You can check it through our website by accessing the My Pedidos page and clicking on 'Check Datos Usage'. Alternatively, you can contact our customer support for assistance.

q9.question: Cuándo will I receive my eSIM?
q9.answer: Mobile11 will send su eSIM inmediatamente after pago. Usted'll receive a confirmation correo with a código QR and paso-by-paso activación instructions. And for su convenience, the detalles will also be sent via WhatsApp. If usted don't receive the correo, please contacto nuestro customer soporte team for prompt assistance.

q10.question: Cómo long is the validity period?
q10.answer: The validity period depends on the plan usted compra. It starts from the moment usted first connect to the red at su destino, not cuándo usted scan the código QR. Usted can instalar su eSIM in advance and it won't start counting until usted use it.

howToConnect.faq1Title: Por qué is my eSIM connecting to the wrong red?
howToConnect.faq1Content: If su eSIM is connecting to the wrong red, usted can elegir the correct red manually. Usted can find the disponible networks in the eSIM detalles siguiente to the ICCID. Usted'll need to adjust a few configuración in su dispositivo to seleccionar the correct red.
howToConnect.faq2Title: Por qué can't I see the eSIM on my dispositivo?
howToConnect.faq2Content: If usted can't see the eSIM on su dispositivo, it may not have a unique label. Usted'll need to know the ICCID to find the eSIM — usted can find this number in the app. Once usted have the ICCID, read more to find the eSIM on su dispositivo.
howToConnect.faq3Title: Cómo can I avoid roaming charges?
howToConnect.faq3Content: If usted have a physical tarjeta SIM for su primary plan, the easiest way to avoid roaming charges is to remove the SIM from su dispositivo before traveling outside of its cobertura area. Otherwise, usted can avoid roaming charges by adjusting specific configuración in su dispositivo.
howToConnect.faq4Title: Por qué is my eSIM stuck on "Activating"?
howToConnect.faq4Content: This occurs cuándo usted instalar an eSIM outside of its cobertura area, before it can connect to a supported red. Usted don't need to do anything — the "Activating" estado will go away cuándo usted connect to a red in the cobertura area.
howToConnect.faq5Title: Cómo can I use iMessage and FaceTime with my eSIM?
howToConnect.faq5Content: If usted're using an Apple dispositivo, usted can use iMessage and FaceTime with su eSIM — usted'll need to adjust a few configuración in su dispositivo. Note, usted may need to turn su teléfono on and off for the configuración to take effect.
howToConnect.needMoreHelpDescription: If you have more questions, you can go to our Ayuda Center to learn more or contact support — we're available 24/7 and always happy to help.

whatsEsim.p2: eSIM stands for 'embedded SIM' – it's like a digital tarjeta SIM built into su teléfono. Instead of inserting a physical card, usted simply scan a código QR or descargar su eSIM directly.

q1.question: Do ilimitado datos paquetes have any limits?
q1.answer: Nuestro Limitless plans offer truly ilimitado datos - usted're never cut off. For fair usage, after 10GB of high-velocidad datos per 24-hour period, speeds may be reduced to a guaranteed minimum (typically 5Mbps). This resets diario, ensuring usted always have reliable conectividad.

q2.question: Qué is the fair use policy?
q2.answer: Our fair use policy ensures network quality for all users. You get 10GB of high-speed data daily. After reaching this threshold, speeds are throttled to a minimum guaranteed speed (5Mbps or 1Mbps depending on your plan). Your high-speed allowance resets every 24 horas from your first connection.

q3.question: Can I use hotspot/tethering with ilimitado datos?
q3.answer: Sí! Hotspot and tethering are fully supported on all our Limitless plans. Compartir your connection with laptops, tablets, and other devices without any additional charges.

q4.question: Cuándo does my ilimitado datos plan start?
q4.answer: Su plan starts cuándo usted first connect to mobile datos at su destino, not cuándo usted scan the código QR. Usted can instalar su eSIM in advance and it will only activar cuándo usted use datos for the first time.

q5.question: Qué speeds can I expect?
q5.answer: During su high-velocidad period, usted'll experience the best disponible speeds from local carriers (typically 4G/LTE or 5G dónde disponible). After the diario fair use threshold, usted'll have a guaranteed minimum velocidad that's sufficient for messaging, emails, maps, and light browsing.

dataDeletion.title: Eliminación de Datos

intro.title: Your Right to Datos Deletion
intro.p1: At mobile11, we respect your privacy and your right to control your personal data. Under GDPR, CCPA, and Tailandia's PDPA, you have the right to request the deletion of your personal information from our systems.
intro.p2: This page explains cómo usted can request deletion of su datos, qué datos nosotros store, and qué happens after usted enviar a deletion request.

dataTypes.title: What Datos We Tienda
dataTypes.intro: Nosotros collect and store the following types of personal datos:
items: Cuenta information (name, email address, phone number)
Transaction history (orders, payments, eSIM purchases)
Usage data (app interactions, eSIM usage statistics)
Communication records (support tickets, chat messages, emails)
Social login data (if you signed in via Facebook, Google, or LINE)

howTo.title: How to Request Datos Deletion
howTo.intro: To request deletion of su personal datos, please follow these pasos:
steps: Enviar an email to our support team with the subject line 'Datos Deletion Request'
Include your registered email address and account details for verification
Specify what data you want deleted (all data or specific categories)
Our team will verify your identity and process your request within 30 días

whatHappens.title: Qué Happens After Usted Request Deletion
whatHappens.intro: Once nosotros receive su deletion request, here's qué usted can expect:
whatHappens.timelineDesc: We will process your request within 30 días of receiving it. Complex requests may take up to 45 días.
whatHappens.confirmationDesc: Usted will receive an correo confirmation once su datos has been deleted from nuestro systems.
whatHappens.permanentDesc: Once deleted, su datos cannot be recovered. Any activo eSIMs associated with su cuenta may stop working.

retention.title: Datos We Must Retain
retention.intro: Due to legal and regulatory requirements, some datos cannot be deleted inmediatamente:
items: Transaction records for tax and accounting purposes (retained for 7 years)
Legal dispute resolution data (retained until dispute is resolved)
Fraud prevention records (retained as required by law)
Anonymized analytics data (non-personally identifiable)
retention.note: This retained datos is kept secure and is only used for the specific legal purposes mentioned above.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Cómo long does the deletion process take?
faq.a1: We typically complete deletion requests within 30 días. You'll receive a confirmation email once the process is complete.
faq.q2: Will my activo eSIMs still work after deletion?
faq.a2: No. Deleting su cuenta datos will deactivate any eSIMs linked to su cuenta. Please use all remaining datos before requesting deletion.
faq.q3: Can I recover my datos after deletion?
faq.a3: No. Datos deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed. We recommend downloading any important information before submitting a deletion request.
faq.q4: Qué if I only want to eliminar my Facebook/social login datos?
faq.a4: Usted can request partial deletion. Specify in su correo that usted only want social login datos removed. Su cuenta will be converted to correo-based login.

faq.q2: Is there a limit to cómo many people I can recomendar?

faq.q4: Cómo long until I receive my Mobile11 Money?

faq.q6: Is there a minimum pedido monto for referido recompensas?

faqV2.title: Preguntas Frecuentes
faqV2.subtitle: Respuestas a las preguntas más comunes
faqV2.a1: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that allows usted to activar a mobile plan without using a physical tarjeta SIM. It's built into su teléfono and can be activated al instante by scanning a código QR.
faqV2.q2: Is my teléfono compatible with eSIM?
faqV2.a2: Most modern smartphones soporte eSIM, including iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20 and newer, and Google Pixel 3 and newer. Check nuestro compatibilidad page for the full list.
faqV2.q3: Cómo do I activar my eSIM?
faqV2.a3: After purchase, you'll receive a QR code via email. Simply scan it with your phone's camera, follow the on-screen instructions, and you're connected! The process takes less than 5 minutos.
faqV2.q4: Can I use my eSIM in multiple países?
faqV2.a4: Sí! We offer regional and global eSIM plans that work across multiple countries. Check the coverage details on each plan to see which countries are included.
faqV2.a5: Nuestro soporte team is disponible 24/7 via chat, correo, or LINE. Nosotros offer soporte in both English and Thai to assist usted with any questions or issues.
faqV2.supportAvailable: Nuestro soporte team is here for usted 24/7

loyaltyFaq.title: Preguntas Frecuentes sobre Lealtad
loyaltyFaq.q1: Cómo does the Mobile11 Loyalty Program work?
loyaltyFaq.a1: Every compra usted make earns usted loyalty estado. As su total spending increases, usted move up through Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Platinum tiers — each offering higher cashback rates on future purchases.
loyaltyFaq.q2: Cómo do I ganar cashback recompensas?
loyaltyFaq.a2: Cashback is automáticamente credited to su Mobile11 Money saldo after each qualifying compra. The cashback percentage depends on su current loyalty tier.
loyaltyFaq.q3: Cuándo can I use my cashback?
loyaltyFaq.a3: Su Mobile11 Money saldo can be applied to any future eSIM compra. It's automáticamente disponible at pago — no minimum redemption monto required.
loyaltyFaq.a4: Su tier estado is based on su total lifetime spending with Mobile11. Once usted reach a tier, usted keep it as long as usted remain an activo customer.
loyaltyFaq.q5: Can I combine cashback with promo codes?
loyaltyFaq.a5: Sí! You can use your Mobile11 Money balance together with promotional discounts for even greater savings on your eSIM purchases.
loyaltyFaq.subtitle: Todo sobre Mobile11 Money

countryFaq.q1: Cómo do I get an eSIM for {país}?
countryFaq.a1: Simply elegir a datos plan for {país} on Mobile11, complete pago, and receive su eSIM código QR al instante via correo. Scan the código QR with su teléfono and usted're conectado — no physical tarjeta SIM needed.
countryFaq.q2: Qué red does Mobile11 use in {país}?
countryFaq.a2: Mobile11 partners with the best local carriers in {país} to provide reliable 4G/LTE and 5G cobertura. The specific operador is automáticamente selected for optimal performance.
countryFaq.q3: Can I use hotspot with my {país} eSIM?
countryFaq.a3: Sí, most Mobile11 eSIM plans for {country} support hotspot and tethering. You can share your data connection with other devices like laptops and tablets.
countryFaq.q4: Cuándo does my {país} eSIM plan start?
countryFaq.a4: Su plan starts cuándo usted first connect to mobile datos in {país}, not cuándo usted scan the código QR. Usted can instalar su eSIM before su trip and it will only activar upon arrival.
countryFaq.q5: Qué happens if I run out of datos in {país}?
countryFaq.a5: You can easily purchase a top-up or a new eSIM plan directly from Mobile11. Your new plan will be ready to use within minutos.
countryFaq.title: Preguntas Frecuentes

aboutFaq.a1: Mobile11 is a global eSIM provider offering instant digital SIM cards for travelers. We provide data plans covering 151+ countries with no roaming fees, powered by 1-TO-ALL, Tailandia's 4th licensed telecom operator.
aboutFaq.a2: Mobile11 is headquartered in Bangkok, Tailandia, operating under 1-TO-ALL Co., Ltd. — a licensed telecom operator with over 20 years of experience in the telecommunications industry.
aboutFaq.q3: Cómo many países does Mobile11 cover?
aboutFaq.a3: Mobile11 provides eSIM cobertura in over 151 países en todo el mundo, partnering with 200+ local carriers to ensure reliable conectividad wherever usted travel.
aboutFaq.q4: Qué pago methods does Mobile11 accept?
aboutFaq.a4: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), as well as local payment methods. Todos transactions are secured with enterprise-grade encryption.
aboutFaq.a5: Sí, Mobile11 is operated by 1-TO-ALL, a licensed telecom operator regulated by Tailandia's NBTC. We use enterprise-grade security to protect your data and transactions.
aboutFaq.title: Preguntas Frecuentes

contactFaq.q1: Cómo quickly does Mobile11 respond to soporte requests?
contactFaq.a1: Our support team typically responds within minutos via live chat. Correo electrónico responses are usually within 1-2 horas during business horas. We're available 24/7 to assist you.
contactFaq.a2: Our customer support team provides assistance in English and Thai. Our website is available in 6 languages: English, Thai, Japónese, Korean, French, and German.
contactFaq.q3: Cómo do I request a reembolso from Mobile11?
contactFaq.a3: If your eSIM hasn't been activated, you can request a full refund by contacting our support team via live chat or email at support@mobile11.com. Refunds are typically processed within 3-5 business días.
contactFaq.q4: Can I contacto Mobile11 via LINE?
contactFaq.a4: Sí! You can reach our support team on LINE @mobile11 for quick assistance in both Thai and English. We respond promptly to all LINE messages.
